packageRules.description: Packages with install/build scripts (pnpm `onlyBuiltDependencies` in pnpm-workspace.yaml) run arbitrary code on install. Pull each out of the `group:allNonMajor` batch into its own PR with a distinct title/label, and never auto-merge — so the script-running bump is reviewed in isolation. Keep this list in sync with `onlyBuiltDependencies`.
repo-kit templates all .nvmrc files; a Renovate bump is reverted by `pnpm sync` and fails the merge-checks gate
engines.node / engines.pnpm are written by repo-kit (.repo-kit.yml); updating them fails the sync gate
tsdown's version is owned by repo-kit (.repo-kit.yml), not Renovate
